data.title: Add structural marker tests for --auto mode gate bypasses in architect-foundation SKILL.md
data.description:
testing_mode: UPDATE

Files: tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh, .test-index

Add 5 new test functions after the existing test_idempotency invocation (before print_summary). All 5 FAIL RED against current SKILL.md because no 'In --auto mode' bypass markers exist yet.

1. test_auto_bypass_phase2_gate
   awk '/^## Phase 2:/,/^## Phase 2\.5:/' "$SKILL_MD" | grep -q 'In --auto mode'

2. test_auto_bypass_phase2_5_gate
   awk '/^## Phase 2\.5:/,/^## Phase 2\.75:/' "$SKILL_MD" | grep -q 'In --auto mode'

3. test_auto_bypass_phase2_75_gate
   awk '/^## Phase 2\.75:/,/^## Phase 2\.8:/' "$SKILL_MD" | grep -q 'In --auto mode'

4. test_auto_bypass_phase3_step075_gate
   awk '/^### Step 0:/,/^### Step 1:/' "$SKILL_MD" | grep -q 'In --auto mode'

5. test_auto_mode_section_enumerates_four_gates
   awk '/^## --auto Mode/,/^## Workflow Overview/' "$SKILL_MD" | grep -c 'Phase 2' returns >= 4

Each function uses the existing framework pattern: _snapshot_fail, local var='missing', if awk/grep; then var='found'; fi, assert_eq, assert_pass_if_clean. Call each function by name after its definition.

Add 5 RED marker lines to .test-index BEFORE the git commit (enables pre-commit test gate to tolerate RED failures):
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_bypass_phase2_gate]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_bypass_phase2_5_gate]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_bypass_phase2_75_gate]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_bypass_phase3_step075_gate]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_mode_section_enumerates_four_gates]

Acceptance Criteria:
1. grep -c (all 5 function names) tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh returns >= 5
2. Running test-architect-foundation-skill.sh shows 5 FAIL lines (tests are RED)
3. All 5 RED markers present in .test-index before commit
4. Test file parses without syntax errors (bash syntax-check passes)
5. Existing 29 tests still pass (no non-bypass failures)
